options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: tag_link
options.description: When other multiworld games tag/swap characters, you will auto swap with them and vise versa.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: logic_type
options.description:
Choose your logic difficulty and difficulty of tricks you are expected to perform to reach certain areas.
Please be aware that if you plan on randomizing worlds with BK Moves in the pool, you cannot use "intended" logic.

options.name: victory_condition
options.description:
Choose the victory condition.
HAG1: Unlock the HAG1 fight and defeat Gruntilda.
Minigame Hunt: Clear the 14 minigames and the final Canary Mary race in Cloud Cuckcoo Land to collect Mumbo Tokens.
Boss Hunt: Defeat the 8 world bosses and collect their Mumbo Tokens.
Jinjo Family Rescue: Rescue Jinjo Families to collect their prized Mumbo Tokens.
Wonderwing Challenge: Collect all 32 Mumbo Tokens across all boss fights, mini games, and every Jinjo family to gain access to HAG1 and Defeat Grunty. The Ultimate Banjo Tooie experience!!
Token Hunt: Mumbo's Tokens are scattered around the world. Help him find them!
Boss Hunt + Hag1: Combines Boss Hunt with HAG-1. HAG-1 won't open until the required amount of bosses are defeated.

options.name: open_hag1
options.description: HAG 1 boss fight is opened when Cauldron Keep is opened, requiring fewer Jiggies to win.

options.name: minigame_hunt_length
options.description:
How many Mumbo Tokens are needed to clear the Minigame Hunt.
Choose a value between 1 and 15.

options.name: boss_hunt_length
options.description:
How many Mumbo Tokens are needed to clear the Boss Hunt.
Choose a value between 1 and 8.

options.name: jinjo_family_rescue_length
options.description:
How many Jinjo families' Mumbo Tokens are needed to clear the Jinjo family rescue.
Choose a value between 1 and 9.

options.name: tokens_in_pool
options.display_name: Token Hunt: Mumbo Tokens in Pool
options.description:
How many Mumbo Tokens are in the pool.
If Randomize Signpost are enabled, you are allowed up to 50.
If Nestanity is enabled, you are allowed up to 100.
If neither are enabled, you are allowed up to 15.
Choose a value between 1 and 100.

options.name: token_hunt_length
options.description:
How many Mumbo Tokens you need to find to beat your game.
Choose a value less than or equal to the Mumbo Tokens that you have specified in the pool.

options.name: world_requirements
options.description:
Choose how quickly the worlds open.
quick: Worlds open at 1, 3, 6, 10, 15, 21, 28, 36, and 44 Jiggys
normal: Worlds open at 1, 4, 8, 14, 20, 28, 36, 45, and 55 Jiggys
long: Worlds open at 1, 8, 16, 25, 34, 43, 52, 60, and 70 Jiggys
custom: You pick when worlds open

options.name: custom_worlds
options.description:
Enter a list of jiggy requirements you want for each world unlock. Max values of each world are: 1,10,20,30,50,60,70,80,90.
This option only functions if the World Requirements option is set to custom.

options.name: randomize_bt_moves
options.description: Jamjars' & Roysten's Movelist are randomized.

options.name: jamjars_silo_costs
options.description: Change how many notes it takes to use Jamjars' move silos. Requires the Banjo-Tooie move list to be randomized.

options.name: randomize_bk_moves
options.description:
Banjo-Kazooie's Movelist are randomized.
Mcjiggy Special - You start with Talon Trot and Tall Jump.

options.name: egg_behaviour
options.description:
Change the way Eggs work. Randomize Moves and Randomize BK Moves are required.
Start with Blue Eggs: You start with Blue Eggs, and you must find the other 4.
Random Starting Egg: You start with one type of egg, and you must find the other 4.
Progressive Eggs: You start with blue eggs, and you find items to unlock the others in the vanilla order.
Simple Random Start Egg: You start with one type of egg that is not Clockwork Kazooie Eggs, and you must find the other 4.

options.name: progressive_beak_buster
options.description: Beak Buster to Bill Drill. Randomize Moves and Randomize BK Moves are required.

options.name: progressive_shoes
options.description: Stilt Stride to Turbo Trainers to Springy Step Shoes to Claw Clamber Boots. Randomize Moves and Randomize BK Moves are required.

options.name: progressive_water_training
options.description:
Basic: Dive to Double Air to Faster Swimming.
Advanced: Dive to Sub Aqua Aiming to Talon Torpedo to Double Air to Faster Swimming.
Randomize Moves and Randomize BK Moves are required.

options.name: progressive_flight
options.description: Flight Pad to Beak Bomb to Airborne Egg Aim. Randomize Moves and Randomize BK Moves are required.

options.name: progressive_egg_aiming
options.description:
Basic: Third Person Egg Shooting to Egg Aim.
Advanced: Third Person Egg Shooting to Amaze-O-Gaze to Egg Aim to Breegull Blaster.
Randomize Moves and Randomize BK Moves are required.

options.name: progressive_bash_attack
options.description: Ground Rat-a-tat Rap to Breegull Bash. Randomize Stop N Swap and Randomize BK Moves are required

options.name: randomize_notes
options.description: Note Nests are randomized.

options.name: randomize_treble
options.description: Treble Clefs are randomized.

options.name: extra_trebleclefs_count
options.description:
Convert four 5 note nests into Treble Clefs (20 notes), and adds 3 per additional Treble Clef.
Randomize Notes is required.

options.name: bass_clef_amount
options.description:
Convert two 5 note nests into Bass Clefs (10 notes), and adds 1 filler per Bass Clef.
Randomize Notes is required.

options.name: randomize_jinjos
options.description: Jinjos have fled to other worlds. Other players need to return them home.

options.name: randomize_doubloons
options.description: Jolly Roger's Doubloons are randomized.

options.name: randomize_cheato
options.description: Cheato pages are randomized.

options.name: cheato_rewards
options.description: Cheato Rewards are added to the pool.

options.name: randomize_honeycombs
options.description: Honeycombs are randomized.

options.name: honeyb_rewards
options.description: Health Upgrades are added to the pool.

options.name: randomize_tickets
options.description: Big Top Tickets are randomized.

options.name: randomize_green_relics
options.description: Targitzan's Green Relics are randomized.

options.name: randomize_beans
options.description: CCL Beans are randomized.

options.name: randomize_glowbos
options.description:
Mumbo and Humba Magic are in the pool and automatically unlocked when received.
When disabled, collecting a Glowbo will give you either a Mumbo or Humba Magic.

options.name: randomize_stop_n_swap
options.description: Mystery Eggs, their rewards, and the Ice Key are scattered across the MultiWorld.

options.name: randomize_dino_roar
options.description: Baby T-Rex's Roar is lost across the MultiWorld. Other players need to help him learn to ROAR!

options.name: nestsanity
options.description: Eggs and feather nests give checks when you collect them for the first time. They behave as regular egg nests after they have been collected.

options.name: randomize_signposts
options.description: Signposts give items when read.

options.name: randomize_stations
options.description: Train Stations are randomized.

options.name: randomize_chuffy
options.description:
Chuffy is randomized.
Once received, you can call Chuffy at any unlocked station before defeating Old King Coal.

options.name: randomize_warp_pads
options.description: Warp Pads give checks when tagging them. They can only be used once you receive the         corresponding item to use a warp pad.

options.name: randomize_silos
options.description: Overworld silos give checks when tagging them. They can only be used once you receive the corresponding item to use a silo.

options.name: open_silos
options.description:
Choose how many overworld silos are pre-opened.
If you have Randomized Worlds, pre-opened silos are guaranteed to lead to the first world.
If you enabled Randomized Worlds with BK Moves randomized, you must have at least 2 silos opened.

options.name: skip_puzzles
options.description: Open world entrances without having to go to Jiggywiggy.

options.name: randomize_worlds
options.description: Worlds will open in a randomized order. Randomized Moves and Skip Puzzles required.

options.name: randomize_world_entrance_loading_zones
options.description: The main entrance of each world will warp you to a random world.

options.name: randomize_boss_loading_zones
options.description: The entrance of each boss will warp you to a random boss.

options.name: backdoors
options.description:
Opens many one-way switches on game start, allowing for more backdoor access to levels.
The following gates are preopened: MT -> TDL, MT -> HFP, GGM -> WW, WW -> TDL.
For MT -> TDL, only the gate accessed from TDL's side is opened. For GGM -> WW, the boulders are still intact.
The bridge from HFP's entrance is pre-moved to allow secondary access to Cliff Top.
George is pre-dropped to make HFP -> JRL more accessible.

options.name: open_gi_frontdoor
options.description: Opens Grunty's Industries frontdoor without requiring to get in first.

options.name: signpost_hints
options.description: Choose how many signpost give a hint when read.

options.name: signpost_move_hints
options.description:
Choose how many signposts, out of the signposts that contain a hint, will hint for one of your moves.
The rest of the hints will hint slow locations.
Silos and BT moves will not be hinted if randomize_bt_moves is not enabled.

options.name: add_signpost_hints_to_ap
options.display_name: Add Signpost Hints to Archipelago Hints
options.description:
Choose if a signpost hint is added to the Archipelago hints upon reading the hint.
Never: signpost hints are never added
Progression: hints are added only if the hinted location has a progression item.
Always: hints are always added.
This option only has an effect if signpost hints are enabled and the hint clarity is set to "clear".

options.name: hint_clarity
options.description:
Choose how clear hints are.
Cryptic: hints will only tell you how good the item is.
Clear: hints will tell you what the item is, and to who it belongs.

options.name: extra_cheats
options.description:
Extra cheats will be added to the "CHEATS" sub-menu:
NESTKING  - Infinite eggs/feathers.
HONEYKING - Infinite health/air.
SUPERBANJO - Gotta go fast!
SUPERBADDY - They gotta go fast!

options.name: easy_canary
options.description: Makes Canary Mary Races much easier.

options.name: speed_up_minigames
options.description: Start 3-round minigames at Round 3.

options.name: tower_of_tragedy
options.description: Choose whether to play the full quiz, start at round 3, or skip it.

options.name: skip_klungo
options.description: Make it so you can skip Klungo 1 and 2.

options.name: auto_enable_cheats
options.description: When Feathers and Eggs cheats are found, only enable them automatically when received.

options.name: jingaling_jiggy
options.description: King Jingaling will always have a Jiggy for you.

options.name: replace_extra_jiggies
options.description:
Jiggies over the maximum needed to beat the seed (plus a generous buffer) are replaced by fillers/traps.
If turned off, you are guranteed exactly 90 jiggies.
You can control how likely extra jiggies appear in the pool via extra_jiggies_weight.

options.name: replace_extra_notes
options.description:
Notes over the maximum needed to beat the seed (plus a generous buffer) are replaced by fillers/traps.
If turned off, you are guranteed exactly 900 notes in total.
You can control how likely extra notes show up as fillers by extra_notes_weight.

options.name: extra_jiggies_weight
options.description:
The weight of Jiggies in the filler pool. Requires replace_extra_jiggies.
You are guarenteed enough jigges to open all levels. These are extra.

options.name: extra_notes_weight
options.description:
The weight of 5 pack notes in the filler pool. Requires randomize_notes and replace_extra_notes.
You are guarenteed enough notes to open all jamjars silos. These are extra.

options.name: extra_doubloons_weight
options.description:
The weight of extra doubloons in the filler pool. Requires randomize_doubloons.
You are guarenteed the original 30 doubloons. These are extra.

options.name: egg_nests_weight
options.description: The weight of Egg nests in the filler pool. The weight is doubled if nestsanity is on.

options.name: feather_nests_weight
options.description: The weight of Egg nests in the filler pool. The weight is doubled if nestsanity is on.

options.name: big_o_pants_weight
options.description: The weight of Big-O-Pants (nothing) in the filler pool.

options.name: golden_eggs_weight
options.description:
The weight of Golden Eggs in the filler pool.
You are forced to use Golden Eggs for a minute upon receiving the trap.
Requires Max Traps to be nonzero to have an effect

options.name: trip_trap_weight
options.description:
The weight of Trip Traps in the filler pool.
You trip upon receiving the trap.
Requires Max Traps to be nonzero to have an effect

options.name: slip_trap_weight
options.description:
The weight of Slip Traps in the filler pool.
You slip upon receiving the trap.
Requires Max Traps to be nonzero to have an effect

options.name: transform_trap_weight
options.description:
The weight of Transform Traps in the filler pool.
A transformation animation upon receiving the trap.
Requires Max Traps to be nonzero to have an effect

options.name: squish_trap_weight
options.description:
The weight of Squish Traps in the filler pool.
Stomponadon attempts to squish you upon receiving the trap.
Requires Max Traps to be nonzero to have an effect

options.name: tip_trap_weight
options.description:
The weight of Tip Traps in the filler pool.
You receive a random textbox upon receiving the trap.
Requires Max Traps to be nonzero to have an effect

options.name: max_traps
options.description:
The maximum possible amount of traps that replace fillers in the pool.
Notice that the real number of traps is limited by the number of fillers in the pool, which varies depending on your settings.

options.name: dialog_character
options.description: Change the character that announces your obtained moves, worlds, etc.
